title: koeleria cristata var. pubiculmis
intro: Koeleria cristata var. pubiculmis, also known as crested hair grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata var. pubiculmis include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by combining the dried grass with hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
